arts.ttl: Laureus Awards: Yamal wins breakthrough award
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal won the world breakthrough of the year award at the 2025 Laureus World Sports Awards ceremony in Madrid on Monday.

arts.ttl: How Many Games Will Robert Lewandowski Miss for Barcelona With Hamstring Injury?
arts.sum: Barcelona will likely be without Robert Lewandowski for the Copa del Rey final vs. Real Madrid and at least the first leg of the Champions League semifinals vs. Inter Milan.

arts.ttl: Barcelona ‘very serious’ about signing of Fiorentina star
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Barcelona are expressing a serious interest in the signing of Fiorentina star Moise Kean. That’s according to Diario Sport, citing Italian outlet Tuttosport, who…

arts.ttl: Braida reassuring to Inter for Champions League semi final: ‘Barcelona are beatable’
arts.sum: Former Barcelona and Milan director Ariedo Braida believes Inter can get reach the Champions League...

arts.ttl: Barcelona bound? Bayer Leverkusen star confirms summer exit
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen star Jonathan Tah has this week at long last announced his imminent departure from the reigning Bundesliga champions. Defender Tah’s name has of course long been a prominent…

arts.ttl: Barcelona predicted lineup vs Mallorca - La Liga
arts.sum: Barcelona's predicted lineup for their La Liga clash against Mallorca on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Flick says Ter Stegen is ‘ready’ to return and offers Lewandowski update
arts.sum: As for Lewandowski, who is expected to miss the next three weeks with a hamstring injury, Flick also didn’t set a timetable for his return and say the club won’t rush Lewy’s comeback to ensure he’s fully healthy once he’s ready to play again. The coach revealed that Ter Stegen is finally ready to make his comeback after missing almost the entire season with a knee injury, but didn’t commit to a set date for the goalkeeper’s return.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick responds to anger of several Barcelona stars during Celta Vigo clash

arts.ttl: Nike to Re-Release Barcelona 2000s Total 90 Kit
arts.sum: Nike is set to tap into nostalgia once again with the re-release of one of FC Barcelona’s most iconic kits from the early 2000s.
